zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Olney於1426年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾韋斯頓 安德伍德時，她的父親Robert de Olney32歲，母親Goditha Judith Bozum11423歲。她於大約1446年與Thomas Throckmorton II, Lord of Coughton在英國瓦維其可爾庫頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和9個女兒的父母。她去世於1505年在英國素福爾可素斯 艾爾哈姆 聖 彼得享年79歲，埋葬在英國武斯特斯爾福拉德波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Olney于1426年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾韋斯頓 安德伍德时，她的父亲Robert de Olney32岁，母亲Goditha Judith Bozum11423岁。她于大约1446年与Thomas Throckmorton II, Lord of Coughton在英国瓦維其可爾庫頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和9个女儿的父母。她去世于1505年在英国素福爾可素斯 艾爾哈姆 聖 彼得享年79岁，埋葬在英国武斯特斯爾福拉德波利。

nameMeanings.name: Olney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Olney in Buckinghamshire. The placename derives from an Old English personal name Olla + Old English ēg ‘island’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Olney was born in 1426, in Weston Underwood, Buckinghamshire, England, her father, Robert de Olney, was 32 and her mother, Goditha Judith Bozum, was 11423. She married Thomas Throckmorton II, Lord of Coughton about 1446, in Coughton, Warwickshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 9 daughters. She died in 1505, in South Elmham St Peter, Suffolk, England, at the age of 79, and was buried in Fladbury, Worcestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Olney est née en 1426, à Weston Underwood, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Olney, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Goditha Judith Bozum, avait 11423 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Throckmorton II, Lord of Coughton environ 1446, à Coughton, Warwickshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 9 filles. Elle est décédée en 1505, à South Elmham St Peter, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 79 ans, et a été enterrée à Fladbury, Worcestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Olney 1426 in Weston Underwood, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Olney 32 und ihre Mutter Goditha Judith Bozum 11423. Sie hat um 1446 in Coughton, Warwickshire, England Thomas Throckmorton II, Lord of Coughton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 9 Töchter. Sie starb 1505 im Alter von 79 Jahren in South Elmham St Peter, Suffolk, England und wurde in Fladbury, Worcestershire, England begraben.

ko.St Margaret South Elmham, Suffolk, Engla: 영국 수폴크 스트 마거릿 소우스 엘함
ko.South Elmham St Peter, Suffolk, England: 영국 수폴크 소우스 엘함 스트 피터
ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Olney(이)가 1426년 영국 벅잉함실르 웨스턴 운더우드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Olney(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Goditha Judith Bozum(은)는 11423세였다. 그녀는 대략 1446년 영국 워윅실르 코우그h턴에서 Thomas Throckmorton II, Lord of Coughton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1505년 영국 수폴크 소우스 엘함 스트 피터에서 79세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 워스스터실르 플라드버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Olney nasceu em 1426, em Weston Underwood, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Olney, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Goditha Judith Bozum, tinha 11423 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Throckmorton II, Lord of Coughton aproximadamente 1446, em Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 9 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1505, em South Elmham St Peter, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 79 anos, e foi sepultada em Fladbury, Worcestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.South Elmham St Peter, Suffolk, England: соут элмхам ст питир, суффолк, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Olney родилась в 1426 г. в местности вестон ундирвуд, буккингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert de Olney было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Goditha Judith Bozum, 11423. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Throckmorton II, Lord of Coughton около 1446 г. в местности коугтон, варвиккшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 9 дочерей. Она умерла в 1505 г. в местности соут элмхам ст питир, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 79 лет и была похоронена в местности фладбури, ворсестиршир, Англия.

es.South Elmham St Peter, Suffolk, England: South Elmham St Peter, Suffolk, Inglaterra
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Olney nació en 1426, en Weston Underwood, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Olney, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Goditha Judith Bozum, tenía 11423 años. Se casó con Thomas Throckmorton II, Lord of Coughton aproximadamente 1446, en Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 9 hijas. Murió en 1505, en South Elmham St Peter, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 79 años, y fue sepultada en Fladbury, Worcestershire, Inglaterra.
